# BIGDREEM

> A pitch-deck builder and fundraising coach for founders raising capital. Turn raw
> business info into an investor-structured deck, and get coached on what funders
> actually want on every slide.

Themed front-end MVP (mock/templated data, no backend, no accounts). Built with the
HMA project foundation.

## Routes
- / : Home — what BIGDREEM does, the coaching pillars, and example decks
- /new : Guided intake wizard (8 steps) that generates a full templated deck
- /decks : Your saved decks, each with an investor-readiness score
- /decks/:id : Deck editor — slide rail + editable slide + the Investor Lens coaching panel
- /decks/:id/present : Full-screen presentation + print-to-PDF export

## Entities
- Deck : a pitch deck (name, the founder's intake answers, slides, timestamps)
- Slide : one deck slide (type, headline, body, optional standout metric)
- Investor Lens : rule-based fundraising coaching — per-slide notes + a 0–100 readiness score

## Notes
This is a client-rendered SPA. The schema.org structured data aids AI/search understanding
but is NOT a guarantee of AI visibility, and the app is NOT agent-operable (there is no MCP
or agent surface). Live AI generation, accounts/save, and PPTX/Slides export are later tiers.
